meta.feature: P0 — CRM Kanban + Data Health Dashboard

tasks.summary: Add kanban view + stage transition API endpoint
tasks.description: Add two new views: kanban_view (GET /pipeline/kanban/) renders the board with all PipelineProperty records grouped by stage. transition_stage (POST /pipeline/<id>/transition/) receives stage param, validates forward-only rule, updates stage, returns JSON.

acceptance_criteria.description: GET /pipeline/kanban/ returns HTML with 6 stage columns
POST /pipeline/<id>/transition/ with valid stage returns 200 and updates DB
POST with invalid stage (backward/skip) returns 400 with error

tasks.summary: Wire up kanban template with SortableJS drag-and-drop
tasks.description: Update templates/pipeline/kanban.html to: render cards grouped by stage, include SortableJS CDN script, add static/js/kanban.js with drag-and-drop + fetch POST to transition API.

acceptance_criteria.description: Kanban page shows cards grouped in stage columns
Drag-and-drop triggers fetch POST to transition API

tasks.description: Add DataSourceHealth model to core/models/pipeline.py with fields: source_name, last_run, record_count, status (ok/error/unknown), error_message. Generate migration.

acceptance_criteria.description: DataSourceHealth model exists with required fields

tasks.summary: Update system status page with data source health table
tasks.description: Update system_status view to query DataSourceHealth and pass to template context. Update the system status template to render a health table with source name, last run, record count, and status badge.

acceptance_criteria.description: System page shows data source health table
Table shows source name, last_run, record_count, status
Status badge shows green for ok, red for error
